findings.observed_behaviour: Every operational intervention is a station on the image-pattern-release arc; existential, decision, life-mapping, writing, structured cognitive work are name-only, absent, or prohibited (repertoire matrix: 8 fully operational families, all arc-shaped).
findings.causal_mechanism: The clinician selects freely from a menu that contains one route; narrowing is the deterministic output of the corpus, not model drift. Zero occurrences of 'existential' across ~10K lines including CLINICAL_MANUAL.md.

findings.observed_behaviour: No field or instruction captures what the user is asking for, the session objective, or a completion criterion; continuityNote is optional free prose consumed by no code and truncated in the middle (assemble.ts:388-399).
findings.causal_mechanism: The clinician cannot check its route against a contract that is never captured; gates, practice hierarchy and closure never read any formulation object.

findings.observed_behaviour: Non-negotiable per-turn checklist demands emotion_named/body_located tokens 'on nearly every turn'; emission mandates shape conversational moves into loggable arc anatomies.
findings.causal_mechanism: The model is instructed to produce gate evidence every turn, which materialises as emotion/body interrogation of users who did not bring emotional requests.

findings.observed_behaviour: Cognitive channel carries a standing 'invite body location so the work does not stay in the head' directive; channel is one last-write-wins value presented as a stable finding; NEXT_BEST_MODES has no stay-cognitive option; refusals wiped each session.
findings.causal_mechanism: Perception modality is conflated with method of work, and cognition is operationally treated as a bridge to the body rather than a valid primary mode.

findings.observed_behaviour: Progression is measured only in arc artifacts; regression is honoured on the AI's word alone (downward bias); session closure has no code representation and the prompt's closure conditions are release-shaped (body softened, image positive, relief confirmed) with no request check.
findings.causal_mechanism: A successful release satisfies every closure condition in the corpus, so sessions end when the ritual completes rather than when the request is addressed; six premature-closure pathways identified (P1-P6).

findings.observed_behaviour: Stage 1 classic gate still hard-requires anchorText set AND anchor_identified token although canon removed both from the gate on 2026-07-02.
findings.causal_mechanism: Users without qualifying anchor material are held in Stage 1 by code canon disowned, sustaining anchor-hunting pressure; only the move-based lane can bypass.

findings.observed_behaviour: Master prompt still states 'Without all three, the Block 1 to Block 2 gate will not fire' for formulation_confirmed; the gate stopped reading that token in PR #177.
findings.causal_mechanism: The model is pressed to extract a confirmation ritual the code no longer needs, adding scripted behaviour with no routing effect.

findings.observed_behaviour: The opening request leaves raw working memory after ~15 exchanges; the continuity note's middle is dropped beyond 800 chars; nothing instructs the model to preserve the request in the surviving head.
findings.causal_mechanism: Request loss over session length; task contract survives only by accident.

findings.observed_behaviour: Work outside the 38-move / 5-family / 6-channel vocabulary is silently dropped at parse time and never logged; only stage_N arc moves count toward move-based advancement.
findings.causal_mechanism: Non-arc work cannot be recorded, credited, or observed; the system is blind to exactly the behaviour the correction seeks.

findings.observed_behaviour: The user-facing opener frames the product as pattern/parts work and closes with 'tell me how you are feeling today', priming affect disclosure rather than request statement.
findings.causal_mechanism: First-turn material is pre-shaped toward the arc's entry signals; no intake of what the user wants from the work.

findings.observed_behaviour: Open therapeutic cycles and modality refusals are wiped at every 4-hour session boundary; unresolved work and user resistance must be rediscovered each session.
findings.causal_mechanism: Unresolved-material and refusal signals do not persist, enabling premature-closure pathway P4 and refusal re-offers.

findings.observed_behaviour: Regression fires on the AI's advisory alone; advancement requires arc-artifact proof; malformed reports default to stay/watch.
findings.causal_mechanism: Structural hold-at-early-stages bias concentrates users in Blocks 1-2 where the permitted repertoire is narrowest (interaction with B4), so most pilot users only met the reduced menu.

findings.observed_behaviour: releasedAt is stamped whenever the model emits foreignFileReleased, including release-without-prior-identification; the Stage 5 gate and the every-turn archive treat the release as fact.
findings.causal_mechanism: Model claims become durable clinical facts without user confirmation, reinforcing release-completes semantics.

findings.observed_behaviour: On the first turn after stage advancement, the state block instructs 'run [the canonical opener] now' regardless of what the user brings.
findings.causal_mechanism: Premature-closure/displacement pathway P6: scripted ritual supersedes the user's material at stage transitions.

findings.observed_behaviour: Worked example teaches converting a user's self-analysis into parts work ('opens parts territory through their analytical door'); stage guidance shifts analytic users from thought to body.
findings.causal_mechanism: Prompt wording treats cognition and analysis as defence or incompleteness, making the body/emotion the preferred source of truth.

findings.observed_behaviour: Any parental/critical sentence routes to foreign-material identification; any offered visual scene routes to a landscape practice, in the same turn, proactively.
findings.causal_mechanism: The pattern-search and image-capture reflexes observed in the pilot are verbatim instructions.

findings.observed_behaviour: Block 1 permits only anchor-observation, light regulation/grounding, light self-compassion; everything deeper is on a 'Do NOT offer' list.
findings.causal_mechanism: Combined with the router hold-bias (A3), most pilot users experienced exactly the narrow practice set testers reported (breathing, grounding, feet, warmth, affirmation).

symbols_or_sections: closing practice constraint (shared core section 10 line 273)
findings.observed_behaviour: Cycles are defined as parts/foreign/somatic arcs; closure requires body softened, charge reduced, image shifted positively, relief confirmed; sessions must close on a regulation/somatic/grounding practice.
findings.causal_mechanism: Successful release is the operational definition of done; identity statements and releases function as termini regardless of the original request.

findings.observed_behaviour: Conversation-level evidence could not be gathered: no DATABASE_URL or MESSAGE_ENCRYPTION_KEY in the audit environment; transcripts require the authorised-admin export procedure documented in the companion report section 10.
findings.causal_mechanism: not_applicable

findings.observed_behaviour: Blanket prohibition wording bans the whole decision territory; per the 2026-07-19 product rule, decision facilitation is now in scope while advice/prescription remains banned. Replacement wording proposed per location in companion report section 13.4; canon not yet changed.
findings.causal_mechanism: Prohibition written broader than its intent (no advice) forecloses a legitimate request type entirely.
